channel.title: certificate on Rihards Kubilis
channel.description: Recent content in certificate on Rihards Kubilis

item.title: Hackerrank's JavaScript (Basic) Skills Certification Test
item.description: Today I decided to take a peek on Hackerrank’s JavaScript (Basic) Skills Certification Test and completed it. Now I have JavaScript (Basic) Certificate too. Looking forward for Intermediate skills test availability. I am quite excited about the tasks in the test, because I had the opportunity to use JavaScript’s built-in data structures.

item.title: (Basic) Certificates from Hackerrank
item.description: A week ago I noticed that Hackerrank does certification in its own way in certain areas e.g. Python, JavaScript or Problem Solving. Although it is a basic level, but out of curiosity I decided to take this challange myself and today I earned both Python (Basic) skill certificate and Problem Solving (Basic) Certificate via HackerRank. I am going to check Intermediate level (Problem Solving) certification sometime soon also looking forward for Intermediate Python skill certificate availability.
